tasks.label: attach-delve
tasks.command: docker exec rinha-api1 sh -c 'APP_PID=$(pgrep -f "/app/tmp/main"); nohup dlv --listen=:2345 --headless=true --accept-multiclient --api-version=2 attach $APP_PID > /tmp/dlv.log 2>&1 &' && sleep 1

tasks.label: dettach-delve
tasks.command: docker exec rinha-api1 sh -c 'DLV_PID=$(pgrep -f dlv); kill -9 $DLV_PID'
